location: The Pierre Hotel, New York NY
text: Epstein sponsored a table at the Hasty Pudding Gala (Apr 16, 2018) but donated it to an associate named Andrew

location: U.S. District Court, Southern District of New York
text: FBI C-20 update: judge remands Epstein to US Marshals custody July 18, 2019 following child erotica found in NYC search.
FBI files: Ghislaine Maxwell living in Boston MA (Aug 2019), reverse proffer with SDNY set for September.

location: Little St. James Island, U.S. Virgin Islands
text: Co-conspirator ordered to shred Epstein's massage appointment phonebooks at USVI home before search warrant.
Sen. Sasse letter: Epstein found injured, semi-conscious in MCC cell ~3 weeks before his Aug 10, 2019 death.
